title: Balmer Lawrie – Junior Officer, Assistant Manager and More – 20 Posts
org: Junior Officer, Assistant Manager and More – 20 Posts
shortInfo: Balmer Lawrie Recruitment 2026 notification is out to fill 20 vacancies for Junior Officer, Assistant Manager and More posts. Candidates can apply online only from 13.05.2026 to 05.06.2026 through Balmer Lawrie website balmerlawrie.com.

basic_details.job_title: Balmer Lawrie Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 20 Junior Officer, Assistant Manager and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: Balmer Lawrie Recruitment 2026 notification is out to fill 20 vacancies for Junior Officer, Assistant Manager and More posts. Candidates can apply online only from 13.05.2026 to 05.06.2026 through Balmer Lawrie website balmerlawrie.com.
basic_details.organization_name: Balmer Lawrie & Co. Ltd. (A Miniratna-1 Govt. of India Enterprise, Ministry of Petroleum & Natural Gas)
basic_details.post_name: Junior Officer, Assistant Manager and More – 20 Posts

age_limit.age_details: Full Time Engineering Graduate OR 2 years' Full Time MBA / PG Degree/Diploma in Management

qualification.education_qualification: Any Graduate, B.Com, B.Tech/B.E, Diploma, CA, M.Com, MBA/PGDM, PG Diploma

selection_process: Written Test / Group Discussion / Personal Interview (as decided by Company)
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online only through the e-recruitment portal at https://www.balmerlawrie.com/careers/current-openings. No applications sent directly by email or telephone will be entertained. Online submission of application is permitted between 1000 hours on 13.05.2026 till 2359 hours on 05.06.2026. Candidates are advised to complete the application process within official working hours (up to 1800 hours on the last date) as technical support may not be available after 1800 hours.
